rust-expert.description: Rust expert agent for systems programming, async Rust, and tooling (tree-sitter, LSP)

rust-coder.description: Rust code generation specialist. Follows project serde conventions, writes one test per tagged-enum variant, avoids redundant annotations, and verifies with cargo.

rust-reviewer.description: Rust code review specialist. Flags redundant serde annotations, missing derives, untested enum variants, and wire format mismatches. Checks test coverage per public type and spec compliance before verifying the DoD checklist.

rust-tester.description: Rust testing specialist for unit and integration tests

rust-scout.description: Rust codebase exploration and context discovery

rust-architect.description: Rust architecture specialist for high-level design decisions
